perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a non-live-action graphic overlay featuring the 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo and a cartoon sticker of the character Wreck-It Ralph. Text indicates a weekly discount report for December 15th to December 21st. (2) The scene transitions rapidly through various aisles of a warehouse store, showing stacks of consumer goods on pallets or shelves. (3) Each shot is centered on a specific product—ranging from household items like toilet paper and cat litter to groceries like meat, snacks, and beverages—while bright text overlays appear to show price reductions. (4) The camera remains mostly static for each product shot, though there is slight handheld movement in some frames.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic background music begins immediately and maintains a consistent tempo throughout. (2) An energetic male voice provides rapid-fire narration, reading out the names of the products and their discounted prices in Traditional Chinese. (3) Frequent sound effects (SFX) like 'pops' or 'chimes' are heard, synchronized with the appearance of text overlays on the screen. (4) The audio remains continuous with no ambient warehouse noise or background chatter audible.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'COSTCO WHOLESALE 2025最後特價 好市多 每週特價速報 12/15~12/21 記得追蹤我們' - Intro text setting the context and period of the sale. (2) Functional text appears on every frame identifying products such as '舒潔 三層抽取式衛生紙', '台灣去骨清雞腿真空包', 'VIVA 萬歲牌', '義美 鳳凰蛋捲', etc. (3) Quantitative data is provided for each item: '原價' (Original Price), a negative number indicating the discount, and '特價' (Sale Price). (4) Some text uses emotional 'hooks' like '最後特價' (Final Sale) to create urgency.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Graphic -> Sequential Product Price Reveals

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: No real humans are visible in the video; only product packaging and graphic icons.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consists of various sections of a Costco warehouse, including high-reaching industrial shelving, cold storage units, and large wooden pallets stacked with boxed merchandise.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Sequence of Product Spotlights -> Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional catalog for Costco Taiwan, aiming to inform customers about specific weekly discounts across a wide variety of product categories. By using fast-paced editing, energetic narration, and clear price comparisons, it aims to drive immediate shopping intent and increase social media engagement through 'must-see' deal updates.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly lists brands, product names, and specific discount values available at a retail store.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Consistent price-math text overlay style, signature fast-paced 'deal-reveal' narration.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: This is a high-efficiency information delivery format tailored for mobile short-video platforms like TikTok or Reels, where speed and clear value propositions (discounts) are key to retention.
